changed.summary: Added default command handler for zero-config personal mode and --promote flag to init command for migrating ephemeral topology to repo root
changed.before: Exposed explicit subcommands (review, analyze, serve, init) requiring manual invocation
structural_changes: Added imports: runPersonalMode, promoteTopology from personal.js
Added --promote flag to init command; conditionally calls promoteTopology() when set instead of initTopology()
Added default command handler (bare 'differ' invocation) accepting --base, --port, --intent, --model options
Added action calling runPersonalMode(opts) for default command

decision_trace.decision: Introduce zero-config personal mode triggered by bare 'differ' invocation
alternatives: Keep explicit subcommands only, requiring users to chain review/analyze/serve manually
Make personal mode an explicit subcommand like 'differ personal'
Use configuration file to enable auto-mode
decision_trace.rationale: A default action provides the lowest friction for quick reviews — users can run a single command without subcommand knowledge. The tool auto-scaffolds topology in .differ/, runs analysis, and launches the review server in one shot.

decision_trace.decision: Use .differ/ directory for ephemeral state and gitignore it
alternatives: Require users to manually create working directory
decision_trace.rationale: A local .differ/ directory keeps state adjacent to the project for easy inspection, supports promotion to repo root when ready, and is simple to exclude from version control. Local state is more discoverable than system temp.

decision_trace.decision: Add --promote flag to init command rather than separate promote subcommand
alternatives: Manual file copy by user from .differ/ to root
decision_trace.rationale: Overloading init with --promote reuses existing scaffolding logic and keeps topology lifecycle operations (create, promote) together under one command. Users testing personal mode can commit topology with a single flag.

edges_added.description: runs Claude analysis on captured diff
computes graph positions for topology nodes

intent: Add zero-config personal review mode that auto-runs diff capture, analysis, and review server on bare 'differ' invocation
